title: Fix RecommendedBridges rendered with no context props — 30+ bridge rules never fire
description: page.tsx:277 — RecommendedBridges rendered as <RecommendedBridges className='mx-2 my-3' /> with NO conceptId/algorithmId/topic props. The 30+ context-sensitive rules in bridge-rules.ts can never match. The entire contextual bridge recommendation system is silently broken. Fix: pass current module context (from each module's hook) into RecommendedBridges.
acceptanceCriteria: RecommendedBridges receives context props from the active module
When viewing TCP in Networking, bridge rules for networking→system-design fire
When viewing BFS in Algorithms, bridge rules for algorithms→system-design fire
At least 5 different bridge rules demonstrably trigger across modules

title: Fix undefined CSS variables in cross-module UI components
description: BridgePanel.tsx:34-43, ModuleContextBar.tsx:41-42, RecommendedBridges.tsx:63-67 reference --bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --text-primary which are NOT defined in globals.css. Design system uses --background, --surface, --foreground. Fix: replace with correct tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: Zero references to --bg-primary, --bg-secondary, --bg-tertiary, --text-primary, --text-secondary, --text-tertiary
Bridge UI components render correctly in both dark and light themes

title: Add reverse bridges FROM system-design TO other modules
description: bridge-rules.ts — All 30+ bridge rules flow TO system-design. Zero bridges go FROM system-design to other modules. Users in System Design see no recommendations. Fix: add 10+ reverse bridges (load balancer→distributed/consistent-hashing, database indexes→data-structures/B-tree, gRPC→networking, etc.).
acceptanceCriteria: At least 10 reverse bridge rules from system-design to other modules
BridgePanel shows recommendations when viewing System Design
OS and ML Design modules also get bridge entries (currently zero)

title: Add progress data export/import and localStorage-only warning
description: All progress (XP, streaks, mastery, attempts) is localStorage-only. No sync, export, or warning. Fix: add Export/Import buttons in settings, show one-time warning toast, add partialize to progress-store to cap unbounded attempts growth.
acceptanceCriteria: Settings panel has Export Progress (JSON download) and Import Progress (JSON upload)
First-time user sees toast about local-only persistence
progress-store uses partialize to limit stored data size

title: Fix light theme missing visualization/tooltip token overrides in globals.css
description: globals.css — html.light redefines core tokens but NOT --viz-* chart tokens or tooltip tokens. Dark-optimized colors like --viz-tooltip-bg produce dark tooltips on light backgrounds. Fix: add light theme overrides for all visualization and tooltip tokens.
acceptanceCriteria: All --viz-* tokens have light theme overrides
Tooltips render correctly on light backgrounds
Chart colors maintain sufficient contrast in light theme

title: Add loading skeletons for all dynamic module imports
description: page.tsx:36-91 — 14 dynamic imports have no loading fallback. User sees blank canvas during first module load. Fix: add { loading: () => <ModuleLoadingSkeleton /> } showing workspace chrome with pulse animation.
acceptanceCriteria: Every dynamic import has a loading skeleton
Skeleton matches workspace layout structure
Smooth transition from skeleton to loaded module

title: Wire ErrorBoundary to analytics tracking (event type exists but unused)
description: ErrorBoundary.tsx logs to console.error but doesn't report to analytics despite ERROR_BOUNDARY_HIT event type in analytics.ts:21. Fix: call trackEvent on componentDidCatch.
acceptanceCriteria: ErrorBoundary reports errors to analytics provider
Error includes component stack trace

title: Fix landing page fake social proof and placeholder links
description: LandingPage.tsx:549-574 has fake company logos and testimonials. Lines 931-947 have href='#' footer links. Line 649 says '12 modules' but 13 exist. Fix: remove fake testimonials, add real URLs or remove links, correct module count.
acceptanceCriteria: No fake testimonials in production
No href='#' placeholder links
Module count matches reality (13)

title: Expand settings panel beyond theme-only — add accessibility, data, and notification sections
description: settings-panel.tsx only has theme toggle and about section. Missing: reduce motion preference, font size control, data management (export/import), notification preferences. All capabilities exist in stores but aren't exposed to users.
acceptanceCriteria: Accessibility section with reduce-motion toggle and font size selector
Data section with Export/Import progress buttons
Notification section with toast duration and sound toggle
All settings persist via stores

title: Fix dashboard 'Recommended Next' navigating to / instead of specific module
description: dashboard/page.tsx:280 — handleGoToCanvas uses window.location.href = '/' regardless of recommended module. The module-specific navigation is lost. Fix: set activeModule before navigating.
acceptanceCriteria: Clicking recommended module card opens that specific module
Module loads immediately without additional clicks
